description: Order Jimmy John's from the terminal — Freaky Fast Rewards stacking, half-order builder, and one-shot reorder.

novel_features.name: Unwich Converter
novel_features.description: Convert a sandwich's modifier set to an Unwich (lettuce wrap) variant — pure-local modifier-delta computation, no live API call.

novel_features.name: Half-and-Half Composer
novel_features.description: Compose a two-product share order with the agent-facing note that JJ doesn't natively support half-and-half slicing.

novel_features.name: Office Lunch Planner
novel_features.description: Suggest a sized cart for a group order — sandwiches + sides + cookies + drinks scaled to N people with dietary filters.

novel_features.name: Local Stats
novel_features.description: Local SQL aggregation over synced stores/products/orders — offline analytics, no live API call.

novel_features.name: Ordering Trends
novel_features.description: Weekly cadence and ordering breakdown derived from local order history.

novel_features.name: Store Reconcile
novel_features.description: Diff locally synced stores against the live API and report drift.
